column1: # Hausa (hau) book names and abbreviations for biblelib
# Conventions: Littafi Mai Tsarki, Bible Society of Nigeria (BSN)
# OT uses descriptive Hausa names where established; transliterations elsewhere
# Abbreviations: derived from Hausa name; no published standard exists
# Deuterocanonical and extended canon: transliterated (BSN is Protestant only)
